title: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild
description: An open-world adventure where a hero awakens from a long sleep to explore a vast kingdom, solve shrines and defeat an ancient evil to rescue a princess.

title: Super Mario Bros.
description: A side-scrolling platformer where a mustachioed plumber jumps across worlds, stomping enemies to rescue a princess from a spiked turtle king.

title: Sonic the Hedgehog
description: A fast-paced platformer starring a blue hedgehog who races through loops and zones collecting rings to stop an evil scientist.

title: Final Fantasy VII
description: A spiky-haired mercenary with a giant sword joins eco-warriors against a megacorporation, in a sweeping role-playing game about a legendary blond-haired antagonist.

title: Minecraft
description: A sandbox game of mining blocks and building anything in a procedurally generated world, surviving monsters that appear at night.

title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
description: A white-haired monster hunter roams a war-torn open world taking contracts and searching for an adopted daughter pursued by a spectral cavalry.
